source.name: Department of Home Affairs — Student visa (subclass 500)

requirements.label: Confirmation of Enrolment (CoE)
requirements.detail: A CoE from your registered (CRICOS) Australian course provider.

requirements.label: Genuine Student (GS) requirement
requirements.detail: Address the Genuine Student criteria, explaining your study intentions in your statement.

requirements.label: Financial capacity
requirements.detail: Show living costs of at least AUD 29,710 for 12 months, plus tuition and travel.

requirements.label: Overseas Student Health Cover (OSHC)
requirements.detail: OSHC is mandatory for the full duration of your student visa.

requirements.label: English language proof
requirements.detail: IELTS/TOEFL/PTE at the level your provider and the visa require.

requirements.label: Valid passport
requirements.detail: A current passport valid for your stay.

requirements.label: Health examination
requirements.detail: Required depending on your country and circumstances.

requirements.label: Tuition / funds transfer
requirements.detail: Transfer tuition or living funds with a low-FX provider.

requirements.label: Connectivity on arrival
requirements.detail: An eSIM gives you an Australian number and data on landing.

requirements.label: Accommodation
requirements.detail: Arrange housing early in major cities.
